name: Chicken- Taco Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked shredded turkey or chicken (2 to 3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use brown rice, but you may also use white rice.
- You can substitute ham or crumbled ground beef if desired.
2. Layer the cooked rice in a 9x13 baking dish.
3. In another bowl, mix taco seasoning and tomato sauce until well combined.
4. Add shredded chicken to the mixture and coat it evenly with the tomato mixture.
5. Spread the chicken mixture over the rice layer.
6. Frost the chicken layer with refried beans. You may need up to 2 cans for a thick layer.
7. Top with grated cheese.
8. Wrap tightly in foil and place in the freezer.
9. When ready to bake, thaw and then bake uncovered for 30 to 45 minutes or until hot throughout and the cheese is bubbly.
Enjoy!
